basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Associate-I posts. Published under Advt No. EEQ/2023/000625 at the official website NIT Silchar Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 50 years of age and possessing B.Tech/B.E/M.Tech/M.E qualifications in relevant engineering disciplines along with NET/GATE or other national-level examination qualification can apply through email mode till 19 May 2026. Find all details about the NIT Silchar Project Associate-I new va

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Relaxation as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E/M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical Engineering/ Design and Manufacturing/ Materials Science and Engineering/ Metallurgical & Materials Engineering/ Aerospace Engineering/ Chemical and Polymer Engineering/ Plastic Engineering/ Polymer Technology, Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Professional Course Selected through National Eligibility Test (CSIR-UGC NET/Gate) or other National level examination
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E/M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical Engineering/ Design and Manufacturing/ Materials Science and Engineering/ Metallurgical & Materials Engineering/ Aerospace Engineering/ Chemical and Polymer Engineering/ Plastic Engineering/ Polymer Technology and Graduate /Post Graduate degree in Professional Course Selected through National Eligibility Test (CSIR-UGC NET/Gate) or other National level examination conducted by DST, DRDO, IISC, IIT, IISER etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30,000/- + HRA - Rs. 37,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- + HRA - Rs. 37,000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Silchar Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Silchar Project Associate-I position is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E/M.Tech./M.E. in specific engineering disciplines or a Graduate/Post Graduate degree in a Professional Course selected through a national-level examination like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- + HRA to Rs. 37,000/- + HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Silchar Project Associate-I vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Associate-I at the National Institute of Technology Silchar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening of applications followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Silchar located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Silchar is located in Silchar, Assam, with the pincode 788010.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The position of Project Associate-I is for a specific project duration, as indicated by the 'Contract' job type.
